title: Connected Terracotta
description: All 17 terracotta colors now connect. Works with other Connected packs.
body:
## 🧩 Dependencies
**OptiFine** OR [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) are required!
## ✨ Features
- Vanilla Terracotta that connects seamlessly to other blocks
- Compatible with other Connected packs like Connected Series, Overlay's, etc.

## 🔗 Check Out My Other Creation
[![Dead Bush Overgrowth](https://i.imgur.com/GZStmwX.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dead-bush-overgrowth)  
**Dead Bush Overgrowth**  
A desert-focused overgrowth pack that adds bones, skulls, and abandoned remnants.

[![Seagrass Overgrowth](https://i.imgur.com/eWHoHq1.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/seagrass-overgrowth)  
**Seagrass Overgrowth**  
Enhances ocean biomes by turning plain seagrass into dense, natural overgrowth with neutral, coral-blended tones.
